Petition

Sick of those damn censors well fill the form out below to stop Funimation from sensoring DBZ. Come on we need your help!!! Whats gonna happen is once there is enough people im going to invite a rep of Funimation to check it out and ill make sure they get the invitation, then they'll see what the true fans of DBZ(you) think about the censors. I know one other person in this. There are probably 1000 already on his but not enough. So i kinda teamed up with him and I'm starting this so "WE" can add to his.Tell everyone you can bout this and spred the word! We need your input so please sign!!
